description: Create a Visual Search experiment in PsychoPy Builder to demonstrate the 'Pop-out vs Serial Search' effect. Implement dynamic spatial randomization for stimuli using a code component. The experiment requires a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/visual_search/search_conditions.csv with at least 12 trials balancing 'target_present' (1/0), 'set_size' (3/6), and 'corrAns'. The experiment file /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/visual_search/visual_search.psyexp must include an instructions routine and a trial routine. The trial routine should manage one target ('T') and five distractors ('L') such that their positions are randomized each trial, distractors have randomized orientations (0, 90, 180, 270), and the visible set size and target presence correctly reflect the parameters in the conditions file. Save all experiment files to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/visual_search/.
